diagram_title: Render Session-Scoped Data With Explicit Freshness

activities.title: Stamp Received Time On Incoming Events
activities.description: Client reducer writes Date.now() into the store entry's receivedAt field whenever a session-scoped SSE event arrives for a given sid (DD-1 inline field, DD-4 no silent fallback).

activities.title: Tick Freshness Clock Every Second
activities.description: useFreshnessClock helper owns a single 1-second setInterval that drives the shared freshnessNow Solid signal; all freshness-aware memos subscribe to the same signal (DD-2).

activities.title: Compute Fidelity From Received Time
activities.description: Per-entry freshness memo reads (freshnessNow - receivedAt) and compares against soft/hard thresholds to classify fidelity as fresh / stale / hard-stale. Missing or invalid receivedAt forces hard-stale (DD-4).

activities.title: Render UI With Fidelity Aware Degradation
activities.description: Session page, side panel, tool page consume fidelity classification to apply per-component degradation (stale badge / card collapse / grayed elapsed). PromptInput does NOT subscribe to fidelity; it only blocks on permission/question pending (DD-6 retires connection-state coupling).

activities.title: Load Freshness Tweaks
activities.description: Client bootstrap fetches GET /config/tweaks/frontend and exposes ui_session_freshness_enabled, ui_freshness_threshold_sec, ui_freshness_hard_timeout_sec as Solid signals. Feature flag (DD-5) gates A4 degradation; thresholds (DD-3) drive A3 classification.

arrows.label: Rendered UI (DOM, including stale hints / collapsed cards / grayed timers)
Solid fine-grained memos (per-entry) in session.tsx / session-side-panel.tsx / tool-page.tsx
